summary: Reposted news segment shown in a vertical crop. The frame shows an enlarged photo of two smiling young boys. Lower-third banners read in part 'FOR ILLEGAL WHO KILLED T...' and a separate sports ticker 'KORIR SHATTERS BOSTON MAR...'; a burned-in caption reads 'THE ROAD AND HIT.' The audio is the DHS Secretary commenting on enforcing immigration laws after a fatal incident. The tweet text refers to two boys and open-border consequences.

script.scene: Enlarged photo of two smiling young boys; chyron 'FOR ILLEGAL WHO KILLED T...' with a sports ticker; caption 'THE ROAD AND HIT.'
